name: todo-serverless-microservices
description: Todo Management System using AWS Serverless Microservices

scripts.deploy:infra: cd infra && npm install && npx serverless deploy
scripts.deploy:todo: cd services/todo-service && npm install && npx serverless deploy
scripts.deploy:processor: cd services/task-processing-service && npm install && npx serverless deploy
scripts.deploy:notification: cd services/notification-service && npm install && npx serverless deploy
